pageTitle: Vorici Calculator (PoE) – Chromatic Orb Cost Calculator
pageDescription: Calculate Chromatic Orb costs, socket color odds, average attempts, and success rates with our PoE Vorici Calculator for Path of Exile.
importantBody: Socket color odds follow item attribute weights: P(Red) = STR ÷ (STR + DEX + INT), and similarly for green and blue. Multinomial probability gives per-attempt success; expected cost ≈ 1 ÷ success rate. Vorici bench crafts guarantee 1–3 sockets of one color (15 / 100 / 150 Chromatics) before spamming the rest.
resultsSubtitle: Probabilities, expected cost, and recommended method
emptyHint: Enter item requirements, desired socket colors, and click Calculate.
errColors: Red + green + blue sockets must equal total sockets.
